narrative:
Groton Twp township has 933 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
